sentences.target: Je lis un article sur le café.
sentences.reading: /ʒə li œ̃ aʁtikl syʁ lə kafe/

translations.fr: Je lis un article sur le café.
translations.ipa: /ʒə li œ̃ aʁtikl syʁ lə kafe/
translations.en: I’m reading an article about coffee.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un artículo sobre el café.
translations.de: Ich lese einen Artikel über Kaffee.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un articolo sul caffè.
translations.ko: 나는 커피에 관한 기사를 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在阅读一篇关于咖啡的文章。
translations.yue: 我而家喺度睇一篇關於咖啡嘅文章。
translations.pt: Estou lendo um artigo sobre café.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một bài viết về cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik lees een artikel over koffie.
translations.hi: मैं कॉफी के बारे में एक लेख पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω ένα άρθρο για τον καφέ.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en artikkel om kaffe.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca artikel tentang kopi.
translations.sv: Jag läser en artikel om kaffe.
translations.da: Jeg læser en artikel om kaffe.
translations.ja: 私はコーヒーに関する記事を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive and selects a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner marking indefiniteness for the noun.
Common count noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb 'lis'.
Preposition meaning 'on/about'; introduces a prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner marking definiteness for the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu écris un article pour le blog.
sentences.reading: /ty ekʁi œ̃ aʁtikl puʁ lə blɔg/

translations.fr: Tu écris un article pour le blog.
translations.ipa: /ty ekʁi œ̃ aʁtikl puʁ lə blɔg/
translations.en: You’re writing an article for the blog.
translations.es: Estás escribiendo un artículo para el blog.
translations.de: Du schreibst einen Artikel für den Blog.
translations.it: Stai scrivendo un articolo per il blog.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在为博客写一篇文章。
translations.yue: 你喺度為博客寫一篇文章。
translations.pt: Você está escrevendo um artigo para o blog.
translations.vi: Bạn đang viết một bài viết cho blog.
translations.nl: Je schrijft een artikel voor de blog.
translations.hi: तुम ब्लॉग के लिए एक लेख लिख रहे हो.
translations.el: Γράφεις ένα άρθρο για το μπλογκ.
translations.nb: Du skriver en artikkel til bloggen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang menulis artikel untuk blog.
translations.sv: Du skriver en artikel till bloggen.
translations.da: Du skriver en artikel til bloggen.
translations.ja: あなたはブログ用の記事を書いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for the following noun.
Common count noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'écris'.
Preposition expressing purpose or destination; heads a PP.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for the noun 'blog'.
Common noun (borrowed), masculine; complement of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Cet article est en promotion aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Cet article est en promotion aujourd’hui.
translations.en: This article is on sale today.
translations.es: Este artículo está en oferta hoy.
translations.de: Dieser Artikel ist heute im Angebot.
translations.it: Questo articolo è in offerta oggi.
translations.pt: Este produto está em promoção hoje.
translations.vi: Sản phẩm này đang giảm giá hôm nay.
translations.ar: هذا المنتج متوفر اليوم بسعر مخفض.
translations.nl: Dit artikel is vandaag in de aanbieding.
translations.hi: यह उत्पाद आज छूट पर है.
translations.pl: Ten produkt jest dziś w promocji.
translations.el: Αυτό το προϊόν είναι σήμερα σε προσφορά.
translations.nb: Denne varen er på tilbud i dag.
translations.id: Produk ini sedang diskon hari ini.
translations.sv: Den här varan är på rea i dag.
translations.ro: Acest produs este la reducere astăzi.
translations.cs: Tento produkt je dnes ve slevě.
translations.da: Denne vare er på tilbud i dag.
translations.ja: この商品は本日セール中です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; variant used before vowel-initial nouns; modifies 'article'.
Common count noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicative complement.
Preposition forming part of the predicate 'en promotion'; introduces the noun complement.
Common noun, feminine; head of the PP 'en promotion' functioning as a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: On cherche un article de sport.

translations.fr: On cherche un article de sport.
translations.en: We’re looking for a sports item.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一件运动用品。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một món đồ thể thao.
translations.hi: हम खेल का सामान ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちはスポーツ用品を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun; commonly used colloquially for 'we'; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'article'.
Common count noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition indicating category/association; introduces a nominal complement.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'de' specifying the type of article.
